As Satl)fll contacts Venus and
Mercury first and then the Sun, Mars
and Rahu, he will be a money lender and dealer in jewellery.
Since Venus has the Sun and Mars next to him, the native will acquire
paternal property also (legacy). He will have servants and his own
agricultural products. He will have one wife and live happily-He will have
one son.
Jupiter's placement in exaltation and ofMercury and Venus in Aries,
indicate that the native will become more famous than his father and richer
too.
The representative of mother, the Moon, is in Virgo. She will be
beautiful and the Sun in the Moon's exaltation sign shows her faithfulness to
husband.
